'''hawuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:obambulation|obambulation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obambulation|obambulation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hawuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæwikith|hæwikith]] || [[word:hæwikij|hæwikij]] || [[word:hæwikish|hæwikish]] || [[word:hæwiki|hæwiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawuwukuth|hawuwukuth]] || [[word:hawuwukuj|hawuwukuj]] || [[word:hawuwukush|hawuwukush]] || [[word:hawuwuku|hawuwuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawukuth|hawukuth]] || [[word:hawukuj|hawukuj]] || [[word:hawukush|hawukush]] || [[word:hawuku|hawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawufkufth|hawufkufth]] || [[word:hawufkufj|hawufkufj]] || [[word:hawufkufsh|hawufkufsh]] || [[word:hawufkuf|hawufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hawukuthu|hawukuthu]] || [[word:hawukuju|hawukuju]] || [[word:hawukushu|hawukushu]] || [[word:hawukuku|hawukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hawukuth|hawukuth]] || [[word:hawukuj|hawukuj]] || [[word:hawukush|hawukush]] || [[word:hawuku|hawuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hawukuthul|hawukuthul]] || [[word:hawukujul|hawukujul]] || [[word:hawukushul|hawukushul]] || [[word:hawukukul|hawukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hawukuuthuthu|hawukuuthuthu]] || [[word:hawukuujuju|hawukuujuju]] || [[word:hawukuushushu|hawukuushushu]] || [[word:hawukuuku|hawukuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hawukuthun|hawukuthun]] || [[word:hawukujun|hawukujun]] || [[word:hawukushun|hawukushun]] || [[word:hawukukun|hawukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hawukuthuoro|hawukuthuoro]] || [[word:hawukujuoro|hawukujuoro]] || [[word:hawukushuoro|hawukushuoro]] || [[word:hawukukuoro|hawukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
